subcodes.first_line: O thou steadfast in the Covenant! The letter from Ibrahim Effendi hath been received, and likewise the telegram from the Doctor hath arrived [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ثابت بر میثاق سواد مکتوب ابراهیم افندی رسید تلغراف دکتر نیز واصل در میان
subcodes.subjects: @business; financial; property matters, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @autobiographical account; narrative of Abdu'l-Baha, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @consolation and comfort
